children.heading: Cross-references
children.label: a Cross-references
children.text: A reference to a law replaced by this Act, including a reference in a regulation, order, or other law, is deemed to refer to the corresponding provision of this Act.

children.heading: Continuation of regulations
children.label: b Continuation of regulations
children.text: An order, rule, or regulation in effect under a law replaced by this Act continues in effect under the corresponding provision of this Act until repealed, amended, or superseded.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: c Rule of construction
children.text: An inference of legislative construction shall not be drawn by reason of the caption or catch line of a provision enacted by this Act.

children.heading: Actions and rights
children.label: d Actions and rights
children.text: Nothing in this Act shall apply to any rights and duties that matured, penalties that were incurred, and proceedings that were begun before , except as provided by this section, and shall be adjudicated pursuant to the law applicable on the date prior to .August 18, 1990August 18, 1990

the jurisdiction of the district courts of the United States with respect to civil actions under admiralty and maritime jurisdiction, saving to suitors in all cases all other remedies to which they are otherwise entitled.
